ab: pangqaiza wa qali thuini, iaku masa naak a tantuqash binanau’az a minlhafut shitusi Tai-taang mriqaz naak a pan’amaan.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: iamin i Tai-paak milhungqu sa apuy a barimbin mutusi Tai-taang.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: shaunanaiza iamin Tai-taang, naak a pan’amaan patungbarimbin munai barimbin a pangqangqan mashduu iamin.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: barimbin a pangqangqan masa naak a pan’amaan a taun antu ihazish, ya patungbarimbin muhiaw shaunatantu.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: naak a pan’amaan a taun a shirshir itia mathuaw mara’ira’in a mara’in a buqan, musuun ita kmangqtha sa kangqthaan a barimbin mutantu mara’in a buqan.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: isai mara’in a buqan, naak a pan’amaan makathu iamin pakaan sisi numa milhungqu sa tishmamraw.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: mahumhumiza, musuun iamin mutusi mawalhnaq a pruq makaan.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: mathuaw manasha barimbin mawalhnaq a pruq, numawan matung’u-tu-bai iamin mutantu.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: numa amushaiza iamin, mriqaz iamin minu u-tu-bai qriuin suma, numawan milhungqu iamin sa basu musha.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: thuini iamin mutauniza iamin Tai-paak, tihauta iaku naak a pan’amaan a u-tu-bai qazii ya ungqtuaniza.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
